- [ ] No existing open issue covers this same capability

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Quality gate passes (`bash scripts/lib/global-quality-gate.sh`)

- [ ] Issue auto-closed post-merge

## Priority (select one)

- [ ] P1 — High (this sprint)
- [ ] P2 — Medium (next sprint)
- [ ] P3 — Low / backlog
